languages.text: {n}Помедлив, он добавляет:{/n} "Решение ликвидировать открывшееся мне осознание всегда дается нелегко. Я понимаю почему я должен это сделать, но каждый раз это ощущается, будто я убиваю какую-то важную часть себя. Мне страшно осознавать всю правду о Нунциусе, но также я боюсь, что если забуду ее, то после уже никогда не вспомню. И этот страх обоснован".

{n}After pausing, he adds,{/n} "The decision to eradicate a newfound knowledge is never easy. I understand why I must, but each time it feels like I am killing an important part of myself. I am afraid of knowing the truth about Nuncius, but I'm also afraid that if I forget it, I'll never remember it again. And that fear is not groundless."
languages.original_text: {n}Помедлив, он добавляет:{/n} "Решение ликвидировать открывшееся мне осознание всегда дается нелегко. Я понимаю почему я должен это сделать, но каждый раз это ощущается, будто я убиваю какую-то важную часть себя. I am afraid of knowing the truth about Nuncius, but I'm also afraid that if I forget it, I'll never remember it again. And that fear is not groundless."

I am afraid of knowing the truth about Nuncius, but I'm also afraid that if I forget it, I'll never remember it again. And that fear is not groundless."

I am afraid of knowing the truth about Nuncius, but I'm also afraid that if I forget it, I'll never remember it again. And that fear is not groundless."

languages.text: {n}Tras una pausa, añade:{/n} «La decisión de erradicar un conocimiento recién descubierto nunca es fácil. Entiendo por qué es necesario, pero cada vez que lo hago siento como si estuviera matando una parte esencial de mí mismo. Me da miedo saber la verdad sobre Nuncius, pero también me da miedo que, si lo olvido, nunca volveré a recordarlo. Y no es un temor infundado».
languages.original_text: {n}After pausing, he adds,{/n} "The decision to eradicate a newfound knowledge is never easy. I understand why I must, but each time it feels like I am killing an important part of myself. I am afraid of knowing the truth about Nuncius, but I'm also afraid that if I forget it, I'll never remember it again. And that fear is not groundless."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tras una pausa, añade:{/n} «La decisión de erradicar un conocimiento recién descubierto nunca es fácil. Entiendo por qué es necesario, pero cada vez que lo hago siento como si estuviera matando una parte esencial de mí mismo. Me da miedo saber la verdad sobre Nuncius, pero también me da miedo que, si lo olvido, nunca volveré a recordarlo. Y no es un temor infundado».

languages.text: {n}他顿了顿，补充道：{/n}“抹除新知识的决定从来都不轻松。我理解这么做的必要，但每次动手，我都觉得是在亲手扼杀自己重要的一部分。我害怕得知努恩修斯的真相；但我也害怕，我一忘就再也想不起来了。而这种恐惧并非空穴来风。”
languages.original_text: {n}After pausing, he adds,{/n} "The decision to eradicate a newfound knowledge is never easy. I understand why I must, but each time it feels like I am killing an important part of myself. I am afraid of knowing the truth about Nuncius, but I'm also afraid that if I forget it, I'll never remember it again. And that fear is not groundless."

traits.locale_text: {n}他顿了顿，补充道：{/n}“抹除新知识的决定从来都不轻松。我理解这么做的必要，但每次动手，我都觉得是在亲手扼杀自己重要的一部分。我害怕得知努恩修斯的真相；但我也害怕，我一忘就再也想不起来了。而这种恐惧并非空穴来风。”

languages.text: {n}Il s'interrompt un instant, puis ajoute :{/n} « Il n'est jamais facile de se résoudre à supprimer des connaissances nouvellement acquises. Je comprends pourquoi c'est une nécessité, mais à chaque fois, j'ai l'impression de détruire une part importante de mon être. Je suis partagé entre la peur de connaître la vérité au sujet de Nuncius et celle de ne plus jamais m'en souvenir si je continue à l'effacer de ma mémoire, une crainte qui n'est pas sans fondement. »
languages.original_text: {n}After pausing, he adds,{/n} "The decision to eradicate a newfound knowledge is never easy. I understand why I must, but each time it feels like I am killing an important part of myself. I am afraid of knowing the truth about Nuncius, but I'm also afraid that if I forget it, I'll never remember it again. And that fear is not groundless."

traits.locale_text: {n}Il s'interrompt un instant, puis ajoute :{/n} « Il n'est jamais facile de se résoudre à supprimer des connaissances nouvellement acquises. Je comprends pourquoi c'est une nécessité, mais à chaque fois, j'ai l'impression de détruire une part importante de mon être. Je suis partagé entre la peur de connaître la vérité au sujet de Nuncius et celle de ne plus jamais m'en souvenir si je continue à l'effacer de ma mémoire, une crainte qui n'est pas sans fondement. »

languages.text: {n}Bir süre durakladıktan sonra ekliyor.{/n} "Yeni keşfedilen irfanı yok etme kararı asla kolay değildir. Neden yapmam gerektiğini anlıyorum ama her seferinde kendimin önemli bir parçasını öldürüyormuş gibi hissediyorum. Nuncius hakkındaki gerçeği bilmekten korkuyorum ama onu unutursam bir daha asla hatırlayamayacağımdan da korkuyorum. Kaldı ki bu korku yersiz değil."
languages.original_text: {n}After pausing, he adds,{/n} "The decision to eradicate a newfound knowledge is never easy. I understand why I must, but each time it feels like I am killing an important part of myself. I am afraid of knowing the truth about Nuncius, but I'm also afraid that if I forget it, I'll never remember it again. And that fear is not groundless."

traits.locale_text: {n}Bir süre durakladıktan sonra ekliyor.{/n} "Yeni keşfedilen irfanı yok etme kararı asla kolay değildir. Neden yapmam gerektiğini anlıyorum ama her seferinde kendimin önemli bir parçasını öldürüyormuş gibi hissediyorum. Nuncius hakkındaki gerçeği bilmekten korkuyorum ama onu unutursam bir daha asla hatırlayamayacağımdan da korkuyorum. Kaldı ki bu korku yersiz değil."

languages.text: {n}Nach einer Pause fügt er hinzu:{/n} "Die Entscheidung, neu gefundenes Wissen zu löschen, ist nie einfach. Ich verstehe, warum ich es tun muss, aber es fühlt sich jedes Mal an, als würde ich einen wichtigen Teil von mir töten. Ich habe Angst, die Wahrheit über Nuncius zu kennen, fürchte aber gleichzeitig, wenn ich sie vergessen, werde ich mich nie wieder an sie erinnern. Und diese Angst ist nicht unbegründet."
languages.original_text: {n}After pausing, he adds,{/n} "The decision to eradicate a newfound knowledge is never easy. I understand why I must, but each time it feels like I am killing an important part of myself. I am afraid of knowing the truth about Nuncius, but I'm also afraid that if I forget it, I'll never remember it again. And that fear is not groundless."

traits.locale_text: {n}Nach einer Pause fügt er hinzu:{/n} "Die Entscheidung, neu gefundenes Wissen zu löschen, ist nie einfach. Ich verstehe, warum ich es tun muss, aber es fühlt sich jedes Mal an, als würde ich einen wichtigen Teil von mir töten. Ich habe Angst, die Wahrheit über Nuncius zu kennen, fürchte aber gleichzeitig, wenn ich sie vergessen, werde ich mich nie wieder an sie erinnern. Und diese Angst ist nicht unbegründet."

languages.text: {n}彼は間を置いて、こう付け加える。{/n}「新たな知識を根絶するという決断は、決して容易ではない。そうせねばならぬ理由は理解しているが、そのたびに、自分の大切な一部を殺しているような気分になる。私はヌンキウスについての真実を知ることを恐れているが、それを忘れてしまえば二度と思い出せなくなることもまた恐れている。そしてその恐れは、根拠のないものではない。」
languages.original_text: {n}After pausing, he adds,{/n} "The decision to eradicate a newfound knowledge is never easy. I understand why I must, but each time it feels like I am killing an important part of myself. I am afraid of knowing the truth about Nuncius, but I'm also afraid that if I forget it, I'll never remember it again. And that fear is not groundless."
